title: Cover — HaulBrokr
description: Founding deck cover with hero image, tagline, and confidentiality notice

title: The Problem — A Fragmented, Analog Industry
description: $47B market with no digital dispatch layer. Four core pain points.

title: The Problem — The Cost of Inefficiency
description: Three quantified pain stats: 3.2 hrs lost, 38% idle time, $8.2B market waste.

title: The Solution — One Platform. Both Sides.
description: HaulBrokr overview: contractor app, operator app, admin, fleet SaaS.

title: How It Works — Four-Step Flow
description: Post a job → Smart match → Live dispatch → Auto-invoice. Visual step diagram.

title: How It Works — Platform Feature Set
description: Six feature cards: GPS tracking, digital tickets, compliance, payments, bids, SaaS.

title: Market Opportunity — TAM / SAM / SOM
description: $47B TAM, $12B SAM, $480M SOM. Three metric cards.

title: Market Opportunity — Texas-First Expansion
description: Geographic rollout: Houston → DFW → SA/Austin → Sun Belt. Why Texas rationale.

title: Business Model — Three Revenue Streams
description: Platform commission 8-12%, Fleet SaaS $299-$999/mo, Embedded finance Yr 2+.

title: Business Model — Unit Economics
description: Per-job P&L waterfall. Year 1 / Year 3 scale targets.

title: Traction — Where We Are Today
description: MVP live, 40 operators onboarded, 8 GC firms in LOI discussions.

title: Traction — 18-Month Roadmap
description: Four-milestone timeline: Houston to DFW to Texas to Sun Belt. Series A target $8-12M.

title: Technology — Built for Scale
description: React Native, Node.js, Google Maps, Stripe Connect. Moat and defensibility.

title: The Team — Founding Partners
description: CEO (industry), CTO (engineering), CFO (finance). Role cards with equity.

title: The Team — Advisory Board and Open Roles
description: Three advisers. VP Marketing open (3%), employee pool (10%), board observer seat.

title: Equity Structure — Ownership at a Glance
description: SVG donut chart: Founders 70%, Employee 10%, CTO 8%, CFO 6%, Advisers 3%, Marketing 3%.

title: Equity Structure — Partner Benefits and Governance
description: Pro-rata dividends, liquidity rights, board seat, vesting schedules.

title: Investment — Founding Round Terms
description: Round structure, equity available, allocation table by role.

title: Investment — Use of Funds
description: Capital allocation: 40% product, 25% supply, 20% marketing, 10% legal, 5% reserve.

title: Join the Foundation
description: Closing CTA. Founder email, demo link, confidentiality footer.
